description_long: This snowman is composed of three unevenly stacked, rounded snowball segments, each progressively smaller from base to top. The surface is predominantly white with a slightly rough, matte texture, and the form is lopsided, giving it a whimsical, handmade appearance. The front features three indented buttons on the middle segment and a face on the top segment, with two round eye holes and a large, open mouth, all sculpted directly into the snow. There are no visible arms, accessories, or headwear, and the back and sides are smooth and unadorned. The base is broad and slightly flattened, suggesting stability when placed on the ground. This object would be commonly found in parks, sidewalks, or residential yards during winter months.
description: A lopsided, three-segment snowman with sculpted facial features and button indents, made entirely of white snow and lacking accessories or limbs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the snowman's face with two eye holes, an open mouth, and three button indents on the torso.
description_view_1: Rear-left view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the rounded, stacked snowball segments.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the snowman's plain, featureless surface and the irregular stacking of the snowballs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face and button indents, with the snowman's uneven, organic shape.
